'''Omiddelon III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] whose rotational plane and [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] plane were perpendicular to each other. Its weather consisted of an intensely hot climate, followed by a brief mild season, then an extremely freezing winter, followed by another mild season. The planet orbited a very bright and hot star and so was subjected to intense light, heat, and radiation. Omiddelon III was the [[Adar]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].
